contactFaq.helpSubtitle: Find answers to your questions or contact our support team.
contactFaq.subject: Subject
contactFaq.subjectPlaceholder: E.g. Question about a lot, shipping issue...
contactFaq.messageSent: Message sent! Our team will respond within 24h.
contactFaq.faq1q: How does payment work on Vary?
contactFaq.faq1a: Payment is upfront. Funds are held in escrow by Vary until the buyer confirms receipt. A commission for Vary is applied to each transaction.
contactFaq.faq2q: How can I become both a seller and a buyer?
contactFaq.faq2a: You can request dual access from your profile. Each role requires separate verification. Once approved, you'll have access to both platforms via the tabs at the top of the page.
contactFaq.faq3q: How is shipping organized for lots?
contactFaq.faq3a: Vary offers integrated shipping to simplify logistics. The seller can also manage their own shipments. Shipping costs are automatically calculated based on location and volume.
contactFaq.faq4q: What to do in case of a dispute?
contactFaq.faq4a: Vary manages disputes in a structured manner. Contact our support team via the form below or by email. Escrow funds are only released after the dispute is resolved.
contactFaq.faq5q: How are sellers and buyers verified?
contactFaq.faq5a: Each registration is verified by our team: SIRET/VAT, address, actual business activity. Only verified companies can access the platform, ensuring reliable B2B transactions.
contactFaq.faq6q: Can I filter which buyers see my lots?
contactFaq.faq6a: Yes, as a seller you can restrict the visibility of your items by location, store type, and revenue of buyers.

sellerDisputes.title: Disputes
sellerDisputes.emptyDesc: Disputes will appear here if a buyer reports an issue with their order.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.s1Text: These Terms and Conditions of Sale (T&Cs) govern the contractual relationships between professional users (buyers and sellers) and the Vary platform, a B2B marketplace specializing in wholesale merchandise lots.
cgv.s2Text: Access to the platform is reserved for professionals with a valid SIRET number or European equivalent. Each registration is subject to verification by the Vary team before account activation.
cgv.s3Text: All prices are displayed excluding tax (excl. VAT). Payment is made upfront at the time of order. Funds are held in escrow by Vary until the buyer confirms receipt. A commission is applied on each transaction.
cgv.s4Text: Once the order is confirmed and payment validated, the seller has 5 business days to ship the goods. The seller is responsible for packaging and shipping. The buyer has 48 hours after receipt to report any issues.
cgv.s5Text: Funds are held by Vary throughout the transaction. They are released to the seller after the buyer confirms receipt or automatically after 7 days without a claim.
cgv.s6Text: In case of a dispute, parties have 7 days to reach an amicable agreement via Vary messaging. After this period, Vary intervenes as a mediator and makes a final decision based on evidence provided (photos, shipping documents).
cgv.s7Text: Buyer and seller VIP subscriptions are billed monthly at €299 excl. VAT/month. The subscription is automatically renewed unless cancelled before the end of the current period. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current month.
cgv.s8Text: These T&Cs are governed by French law. Any dispute not resolved amicably shall be submitted to the competent courts of Paris.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.s1Text: The Vary website is published by Vary SAS, a simplified joint-stock company with a capital of [amount] euros, registered with the Paris Trade Register under number [number]. Registered office: [address]. Publication director: [name]. Contact: contact@vary.com
mentions.s2Text: The website is hosted by Lovable Cloud (Supabase infrastructure), headquartered in the United States. Data is stored on servers located within the European Union in compliance with the GDPR.
mentions.s3Text: All elements of the Vary website (texts, images, logos, source code, database) are protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written authorization from Vary SAS.
mentions.s4Text: Vary acts as an intermediary between professional buyers and sellers. Vary cannot be held responsible for the quality, compliance, or delivery of goods sold on the platform. The escrow system aims to protect both parties.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect the following data: first name, last name, email, phone, company name, SIRET number, address, type of activity, and browsing data. This data is necessary for the operation of the platform and professional account verification.
privacy.s2Text: Your data is used for: account management, transaction processing, professional identity verification, order-related communication, service improvement, and compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy.s3Text: The processing of your data is based on: contract performance (T&Cs), your consent (cookies, newsletter), our legitimate interests (security, fraud prevention), and our legal obligations (billing, taxation).
privacy.s4Text: Account data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and 3 years after the last activity. Billing data is retained for 10 years in compliance with accounting obligations. Browsing data is retained for a maximum of 13 months.
privacy.s5Text: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, limit, and object to the processing of your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@vary.com
privacy.s6Text: Your data may be transferred to service providers located outside the EU (hosting, payment). These transfers are governed by standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.s7Text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encryption in transit and at rest, access control, regular security audits, and row-level security (RLS) policies in our database.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1Text: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit our website. It allows us to store information related to your browsing.
cookies.s2Text: We use strictly necessary cookies (authentication, session, language preferences) and analytical cookies (audience measurement, service improvement). No advertising cookies are used on Vary.
cookies.s3Text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings. Disabling necessary cookies may affect the operation of the site.
cookies.s4Text: Session cookies are deleted when the browser is closed. Persistent cookies (preferences, language) are retained for a maximum of 13 months in accordance with CNIL recommendations.
